case_title: JENNIFER ANNE LIANG VS. CHRISTOPHER RANDALL LOCK

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,245.54 FILED BY LIANG, JENNIFER ANNE AS TO DEFENDANT LOCK, CHRISTOPHER RANDALL ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-07-2007 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED MAR-03-2008 ORDERED DESTROYED
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED NOV-07-2007, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT LOCK, CHRISTOPHER RANDALL
MOTION FOR TIME PAYMENTS FILED BY DEFENDANT LOCK, CHRISTOPHER RANDALL HEARING SET FOR FEB-13-2008 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
MOTION FOR TIME PAYMENTS FILED BY CHRISTOPHER RANDALL LOCK ON FEB-13-2008 - DENIED. THE JUDGMENT DEBTOR SHALL PAY THE FULL AMOUNT OF THE JUDGMENT IMMEDIATELY. PLAINTIFF PRESENT.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF DEC-07-2007 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF DEC-07-2008 BY JUDGE PRO TEM RUSSELL DAVIS. CLERK S. VANTREE. DEFENDANT NOT PRESENT. PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RETAINED. NOT REPORTED. (506).
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-07-2007 - JUDGMENT. JUDGE PRO TEM RUSSELL DAVIS, CLERK S. VANTREE, NOT REPORTED. (506).

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LIANG, JENNIFER ANNE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LOCK, CHRISTOPHER RANDALL $5,700.00 PRINCIPAL, $47.50 INTEREST, $75.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,822.50, MONEY TO BE PAID NO LATER THAN JANUARY 1, 2008. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
COPY OF REQUEST TO PAY JUDGMENT IN INSTALLMENT SENT TO PLTF.
